name: scaffold-generator
description: Generate CI-ready package scaffolding for the coding-adventures monorepo

flags.description: Package type: 'library' goes in code/packages/, 'program' goes in code/programs/
Target language(s). Comma-separated or 'all' for all 12 scaffold languages: python, go, ruby, typescript, rust, elixir, perl, lua, swift, haskell, csharp, fsharp
Comma-separated list of sibling package names this package depends on (kebab-case)
Layer number for README context (e.g., 1 for logic-gates, 2 for arithmetic)
Print what would be generated without writing files

arguments.name: PACKAGE_NAME
arguments.description: Name of the package in kebab-case (e.g., 'my-package')
